ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" INTEGER /* Workclass of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight, number of people the census believes this entry represents */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education completed */,
  "marital_status" INTEGER /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" INTEGER /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" INTEGER /* Relationship status of the individual */,
  "race" INTEGER /* Race of the individual */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" INTEGER /* Native country of the individual */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income level of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the individual's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the individual's location */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the individual works */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the current occupation */,
  "last_education_institution" TEXT /* Name of the last educational institution attended */,
  "last_education_degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained from the last educational institution */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits received from the employer */,
  "skills" TEXT /* List of skills the individual possesses */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications the individual has obtained */,
  "languages" TEXT /* List of languages spoken by the individual */,
  "is_retired" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is retired */,
  "is_student" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is a student */,
  "is_veteran" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is a veteran */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country FOREIGN KEY ("native_country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship FOREIGN KEY ("relationship") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the workclass */,
  "is_self_employed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the workclass includes self-employed individuals */,
  "is_government" INTEGER /* Indicates if the workclass includes government employees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Typical number of years required to complete the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Typical industry for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income level */,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the income range */,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the income range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual's data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
